summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Portfolio MSCI Global Stock Market ETF (SPGM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI AC World IMI index, a market-cap-weighted index of global stocks covering 99% of the developed and emerging markets capitalization. SPGM was launched on Feb 27, 2012 and is issued by State Street.

holdings.infoBox: SPGM is an equity ETF with a total of 2984 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 4.32%, NVIDIA at 4.20%, Microsoft at 2.47%, Amazon.com at 2.02%, and Alphabet at 1.79%.

summary.pre: ETF holdings data is provided by
summary.post: . Holdings are typically published by the ETF issuer at the end of each trading day.
